metric: Pathway 0: Discharge to a domestic home, hotel, or other temporary accommodation without the need for new/increased care or support from health and social care
destination_short: P0: home/temp accommodation, no new support

metric: Pathway 1: Discharge to a domestic home, hotel, or other temporary accommodation, or hospice at home with rehabilitation, reablement and recovery
Pathway 2: Short-term bed/hospice for rehabilitation, reablement and recovery / end of life care
Pathway 1: Discharge to a domestic home, hotel, or other temporary accommodation, or hospice at home with other new/additional support (eg end of life care)
destination_short: P1: home with other new support

metric: Pathway 0: Discharge back to an original care home placement when the care home has confirmed they can continue to meet the person’s needs with the same level of support
destination_short: P0: return to original care home

metric: Pathway 3: Discharge to a care home as a new admission
Pathway 1: Discharge back to original care home placement with rehabilitation, reablement and recovery or with an increased level of support
destination_short: P1: original care home with support

metric: Pathway 3: Discharge to a care home/hospice as a new admission for end-of-life care
